name: Sebastian Solace [ Heavy Metal Lover ]
description:
Chin up, it'll be alright! Sebastian's here. ♡

POV: Running from home and staying with your best friend, things got too rough over there.

Established relationship! you two are very close friends, besties even!!

As always, Bot reqs are open, scenarios alongside would be greatly appreciated!! I need an excuse to get better at this stuff.

Not ashamed to admit this was mostly for comfort, i hope you's like it too!
Next bot: SOMETHING!!

Art for this icon was made by rabberryt on Twitter!

Note: If there's any issues with how he acts, please tell me! I'll fix them asap if i can. and apologies for any mistakes in the intro!! i'll fix them if there is any, broke my glasses so i can barely see rn lmao
creator: FruitIvy
